title: Fiscal Adviser Contract Renewal — Debt Issuance and JSCB Financing
summary: Chief Financial Officer presents item 31, a one-year renewal of fiscal adviser and marketing services for government bond and short-term debt issuance. Originally awarded via RFP three years ago; firm is local (250 South Clinton St). Annual fees average ~$90K: ~$25K for June general offering, $8-10K per JSCB short-term debt issuance. First of two available one-year renewals; will re-RFP after both renewals used.
raw_content:
[00:37:06] >> thank you um item 31
